trans-unit.target: This site uses a session cookie required for it to work, and may embed third-party content (videos, etc.) requiring your consent.
We have detected an error :-( We ask you to excuse us.
I can not access this resource because access is restricted and requires identification.
I can not access this resource because access is restricted.
The page I request is not available. Please check the link in the address bar.
The page I requested does not exist anymore.
We have detected an internal error :-( We ask you to excuse us.
Only the French text is authoritative, the other languages being translations.
I agree with Terms of sales (TOS)
I agree that this website stores the submitted data so that it can answer my request
Your browser does not support the audio tag.
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Display order (1 = first); use increments of 5 to leave room.
Frequency at which the page content changes
Priority of the page in the sitemap (0 = low, 10 = high)
Used by social networks when the page is shared
This action is irreversible and will permanently delete the page and its content. Continue?
The page has been permanently deleted.
Ideally close to the title (no accents, capitals or spaces). Editable via the lock icon; a redirect preserves SEO.
Changing the title will change the page's URL (slug), a redirect will be automatically set up. Continue?
Paste the old .html.twig file's content here - interpreted as Twig (config(), path(), etc.).
Includes an existing Twig template by its path
Inserts an existing legal text template (T&Cs, legal notice...)
Slideshow highlighting a selection of articles
Unpublished preview - not visible to the public.

List of all the site's pages. You can create, edit, duplicate, publish, preview, move to trash or permanently delete a page; a deleted page can only be recovered from the trash until it's permanently deleted.
List of the site's URL redirects. You can create, edit or delete a redirect; double-check the source and target URLs, a mistake can break a link or cause a redirect loop.
List of the site's users. You can edit a user's roles or delete them; be careful, changing roles immediately changes their back-office access rights.
Right-click to save the image, use it wherever you want
Image shown when the page is shared. Empty = site's default og-image or logo.
No file has been uploaded yet
Site-wide graphics: favicon, Apple Touch icon, default Open Graph image, logo and error images. Each role (except error image) can only be used once; replace the file to update it.
Please confirm your email address by clicking the following link:
If you don't receive an email please check your spam folder or
To reset your password, please visit the following link
At least 8 characters, with a lowercase, uppercase, digit and special character
Your email address has been verified.
No reset password token found in the URL or in the session.
Auto-resized: favicon to 48×48 px (.ico), Apple touch icon to 114×114 px (.png).
Choose a page or a route
Empty = target page's/section's title (or computed copyright for the "Copyright" page).
An unpublished copy of this page and all its content (blocks, medias) will be created. Continue?
Link to a page or route, sortable with other blocks (navbar, footer, email)
List of the site's menus (navbar, footer, email header/footer). Edit a menu to add, remove or reorder its links; each location (navbar, footer...) can only be used once.
Send failures unrelated to a blacklisted address. Click for details.
A technical issue has been automatically reported
Technical issue auto-reported to the dev team. No action required.
Messages that failed to send; minor cases (blacklist, spam) are purged after retention.
Too many attempts, please try again later.
Clickable slideshow of a chosen page's articles.
Link to a page or a route, used in the site's menus.
The template's blocks will be added to this page (example content, to be edited afterwards). Existing blocks are kept. Continue?
The template's blocks have been added to the page.
Previewing the "%label%" preset - your colors and fonts stay as-is, nothing saved
An unpublished copy has been created with the template's blocks added.
This page will be published in place of "%title%": it will take over its address, and the original will be moved to trash (recoverable). Continue?
The page has been published in place of the original, now in the trash.
The page to replace could not be found (already deleted or renamed): nothing was published.
The page has been restored, but its original address (%slug%) is now taken: it kept its technical address, rename it manually if needed.
Identifies the item within its own collection, used for its detail URL if the "Collection" block defines one - unique per collection only.
Twig template (e.g. "block_showcase/bundle.html.twig") for an item's detail view from this page's "Collection" block. Empty = plain Content field.
Title/description/image/link items belonging to this collection, displayed by its "Collection" block on a page. Drag to reorder, or create/edit/delete an item from this list.
Create a collection, then click "Items" to add content to it. Once created, a collection becomes available as a source in the "Collection" block on any page.
The collection's displayed name - its technical identifier (below) is generated from it automatically.
The collection's technical identifier, generated from its name - this is what shows up in a page's "Collection" block source list, to display its content.
Roles listed below (other than ROLE_SUPER_ADMIN) come from %link_open%this key%link_close%.
Visitor registration toggles in one click from %link_open%the dashboard%link_close% (admin-only).
Renders as a filled primary-color button instead of a link - use sparingly (e.g. "Contact")
Accepted formats: TTF, WOFF, WOFF2 (max 5 MB). Stored in public/medias/fonts and turned into a @font-face rule offered by the theme's font pickers.
Invalid file: only TTF, WOFF and WOFF2 fonts are accepted.
Custom font files uploaded for the site (ttf, woff, woff2). Add, edit or delete a font; each weight and style forms a distinct variant usable in the theme configuration.
The page every visitor lands on first
The navigation links shown at the top and bottom of every page
At least one typeface for your site's text
No PageSpeed Insights API key configured - Google's anonymous quota is shared worldwide and easily exhausted (HTTP 429)
these headers apply to the whole site, checked once via the homepage
No health check results yet for this page.
Improve %category% (score: %score%) - run Lighthouse locally for a full breakdown
Restrict CORS instead of allowing any origin (*)
Add descriptive alt text to %count% image(s)
Fix or remove %count% broken internal link(s)
Site not served over HTTPS, certificate not checked
Could not read the TLS certificate: %message%
Renew the TLS certificate before it expires
Serve %count% resource(s) over https:// instead of http://
robots.txt disallows all crawling (Disallow: / for User-agent: *)
robots.txt is reachable and does not block everything
%file% does not look like a valid sitemap
sitemap-index.xml does not look like a valid sitemap index
sitemap-index.xml does not reference any sitemap
sitemap-index.xml is reachable and references %count% sitemap(s)
